positive: A whimsical and symmetrical stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset. The mountains should have geometric, layered shapes, looking like a modern minimalist vector illustration. Incorporate celestial elements like a full moon and a stylized constellation arc traversing the peaks. The color palette should be limited to deep indigo, burnt orange, soft gold, and muted teal. The composition must be centered, high-contrast, and highly graphic, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Clean lines, strong silhouette emphasis, flat graphic design aesthetic.
